data.body: ALL 6 CHANGES GREEN (V+MAX, LLM+MAX): 653 c366, 654 28f1, 655 4cdf, 656 7ed9, 659 d6bd (integration fix worked), 663 5566. main stable. repo_root resolves to worktree so closes verify against my changes.
